{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Abidan of Sector Twenty-Four Control
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Abidan]] [[Sector Control]] would ordinarily deal with incursions like this [[Fiend]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c38">''Waybound'', chapter 38</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
